peripherals.label: Quectel BG770A Cellular
peripherals.summary: LTE-M / NB-IoT cellular modem with the full Quectel AT command surface.
peripherals.detail: Byte-exact V.250 + Quectel +QI*/+QMT*/+QHTTP*/+QGPS*/+QSSL* state machines, validated against real BG770A-GL hardware captures. Firmware sends AT commands, modem replies stream back over UART.

config_keys.name: apn
config_keys.doc: APN to set on the PDP context (e.g. "internet").

config_keys.name: rssi
config_keys.doc: Initial signal strength reported by AT+CSQ (0..99).

config_keys.name: ber
config_keys.doc: Initial bit-error-rate reported by AT+CSQ (0..99, defaults to 99).

config_keys.name: boot_urcs
config_keys.doc: If true, the modem emits the cold-boot URC sequence on attach.

config_keys.name: auto_attach
config_keys.doc: If true, the modem reports itself already registered + attached at boot.

peripherals.label: NEO-6M GPS
peripherals.summary: GPS module streaming NMEA sentences over UART RX.
peripherals.detail: GGA + RMC sentences with XOR checksum, generated entirely in the Rust core. Firmware echoes the stream back to the host UART.

config_keys.name: lat_deg
config_keys.doc: Initial latitude in decimal degrees (paired with lon_deg).

config_keys.name: lon_deg
config_keys.doc: Initial longitude in decimal degrees (paired with lat_deg).

peripherals.label: ADXL345 Tilt
peripherals.summary: 3-axis ±2/4/8/16 g digital accelerometer over I2C.
peripherals.detail: Analog Devices ADXL345 with the canonical 0x53 / 0x1D 7-bit address pair. Wired through the simulated I2C bus; host stimulus seeds X/Y/Z and the firmware reads them through the DATAX/Y/Z registers.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to 0x53; 0x1D selects the alternate-pin variant.

peripherals.label: MPU6050 IMU
peripherals.summary: 6-axis gyro + accelerometer over I2C.
peripherals.detail: InvenSense MPU-6050 with WHO_AM_I = 0x68. Reports static sample values today; host stimulus hooks into the WASM bridge for live updates.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to 0x68; 0x69 selects the AD0=high variant.

peripherals.label: BME280 Weather
peripherals.summary: Bosch BME280 temp + humidity + pressure sensor over I2C.
peripherals.detail: Returns the same factory dummy readings the real silicon ships with (≈25 °C, 50 % RH, sea-level pressure). Real-time stimulus comes from the WASM bridge.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to 0x76; 0x77 selects the SDO=VDDIO variant.

peripherals.label: SSD1306 OLED
peripherals.summary: 128×64 monochrome OLED display over I2C with a paged framebuffer.
peripherals.detail: Solomon Systech SSD1306 with the canonical 0x3C / 0x3D address pair. Tracks the 8-page-by-128-column framebuffer; the WASM bridge surfaces pixel state for the playground's display overlay.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to 0x3C; 0x3D selects the SA0=high variant.

peripherals.label: SSD1306 OLED 0.91″
peripherals.summary: 0.91″ 128×32 monochrome OLED display over I2C with a paged framebuffer.
peripherals.detail: Solomon Systech SSD1306 in the 0.91-inch 128×32 form factor (4 GDDRAM pages). Identical command set to the 128×64 panel — only the page count differs. Canonical 0x3C / 0x3D address pair; the WASM bridge surfaces pixel state for the playground's display overlay.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to 0x3C; 0x3D selects the SA0=high variant.

peripherals.label: SH1107 OLED
peripherals.summary: 128×128 monochrome OLED display over I2C with a paged framebuffer.
peripherals.detail: Sino Wealth SH1107 128×128 OLED (e.g. the 1.5" GME128128-01-IIC module) on the canonical 0x3C / 0x3D address pair. Tracks the 16-page-by-128-column framebuffer; the WASM bridge surfaces pixel state for the playground's display overlay.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to 0x3C; 0x3D selects the SA0=high variant.

peripherals.label: ILI9341 TFT
peripherals.summary: 240×320 RGB565 SPI TFT display.
peripherals.detail: Implements the cmd / RAMWR SPI protocol against an in-memory framebuffer. The playground surfaces pixels through the simulator bridge so the host can render the display verbatim.

config_keys.name: cs_pin
config_keys.doc: Chip-select GPIO pin (e.g. "PA4"). Defaults to PA4.

peripherals.label: MAX31855 Thermocouple
peripherals.summary: Cold-junction-compensated K-type thermocouple amplifier (read-only SPI).
peripherals.detail: Returns the 32-bit MAX31855 response on every CS-framed transaction. Host stimulus seeds thermocouple + cold-junction temperatures; bit layout matches the real silicon's datasheet exactly.

config_keys.name: cs_pin
config_keys.doc: Chip-select GPIO pin (e.g. "PA4"). Defaults to PA4.

peripherals.label: SSD1680 Tri-Color E-Paper
peripherals.summary: 2.9" tri-color (black/white/red) SSD1680 e-paper over SPI.
peripherals.detail: Full SPI command + display-data RAM state machine, validated by the e2e e-paper integration test. Same model drives both the STM32F103 lab and the ESP32 playground board.

config_keys.name: cs_pin
config_keys.doc: Chip-select GPIO pin (e.g. "PA4"). Defaults to PA4.

peripherals.label: 74HC165 Shift Register
peripherals.summary: 8-bit parallel-in / serial-out shift register over SPI.
peripherals.detail: Lets a host MCU sample 8 GPIO inputs through one SPI clock burst. Used in the IO-Link DI/DO lab to surface field-side switch state.

config_keys.name: cs_pin
config_keys.doc: Chip-select GPIO pin (e.g. "PA4"). Defaults to PA4.

config_keys.name: inputs
config_keys.doc: Optional initial 8-bit input state (0..0xFF) — useful for static test stimulus.

peripherals.label: 74HC595 7-Segment (4-digit)
peripherals.summary: 4-digit 7-segment LED display driven by two chained 74HC595 shift registers over SPI.
peripherals.detail: The classic blue 4-digit module: a segment 74HC595 and a digit-select 74HC595 in series. Firmware shifts a segment byte then a digit-select byte (16 bits), pulses RCLK (SPI chip-select) to latch, and multiplexes the four digits. The model auto-detects the digit-select byte, decodes the standard a–g/dp segment font, and surfaces the four displayed characters.

config_keys.name: cs_pin
config_keys.doc: RCLK latch GPIO pin, wired as SPI chip-select (e.g. "PA4"). Defaults to PA4.

peripherals.label: TM1637 7-Segment (4-digit)
peripherals.summary: 4-digit 7-segment LED display with the TM1637 2-wire (CLK/DIO) driver.
peripherals.detail: The RobotDyn-style 4-digit clock display. The host bit-bangs two GPIO lines with the TM1637's I²C-like, LSB-first, address-less protocol; the model observes both output pins through the bus write-hook, decodes start/stop/data/ACK framing and the data / address / display-control commands, and renders the four grids through the standard a–g/dp segment font (including the clock colon).

config_keys.name: clk_pin
config_keys.doc: CLK GPIO pin the firmware bit-bangs (e.g. "PA8"). Defaults to PA8.

config_keys.name: dio_pin
config_keys.doc: DIO GPIO pin the firmware bit-bangs (e.g. "PA9"). Defaults to PA9.

peripherals.label: Nokia 5110 LCD
peripherals.summary: Nokia 5110 (PCD8544) monochrome 84×48 LCD over SPI.
peripherals.detail: Tracks the 504-byte (84×48 / 8) DDRAM, command vs data discrimination via a host GPIO D/C line that the bus resolves to a concrete GPIO ODR address at attach time.

config_keys.name: cs_pin
config_keys.doc: Chip-select GPIO pin (e.g. "PB6"). Defaults to PB6.

config_keys.name: dc_pin
config_keys.doc: Data/command GPIO pin (e.g. "PC7"). Defaults to PC7. Resolved to the driving GPIO's ODR address at attach time.

peripherals.label: IO-Link Master
peripherals.summary: IO-Link master state machine over UART.
peripherals.detail: Drives wake-up / startup / operate cycles, m-sequence types, process-data exchange. The IO-Link DI/DO device demo uses this to host two digital-input channels.

config_keys.name: pd_in_len
config_keys.doc: Process-data input length in bytes. Defaults to 1 (single-byte DI device).

config_keys.name: m_seq_type
config_keys.doc: M-sequence type (1..6). Used to derive od_len: types ≥ 4 use 2-byte OD frames.

config_keys.name: com
config_keys.doc: Communication speed: "COM1" (4.8 kbaud), "COM2" (38.4 kbaud, default), or "COM3" (230.4 kbaud).

config_keys.name: frame_gap_ticks
config_keys.doc: Inter-frame gap in UART ticks (default 6000). A faster -O2 device can use a small gap so many cyclic reads fit the step budget.

peripherals.label: NTC Thermistor
peripherals.summary: 10 kΩ NTC + voltage divider on an ADC channel.
peripherals.detail: Beta-equation thermistor model. Constructor takes a channel + initial temperature; the kit seeds the ADC channel with the corresponding divider voltage. Live updates come from the WASM bridge as the host moves the temperature slider.

config_keys.name: channel
config_keys.doc: ADC channel index (0..N). Defaults to 0.

config_keys.name: initial_temperature_c
config_keys.doc: Initial temperature in °C used to seed the channel voltage. Defaults to 25.0.

peripherals.label: VL53L1X ToF
peripherals.summary: Laser time-of-flight distance sensor over I2C.
peripherals.detail: STMicroelectronics VL53L1X at fixed address 0x29, modeled against the Pololu VL53L1X driver: MODEL_ID = 0xEACC, SYSTEM__MODE_START to begin ranging, GPIO__TIO_HV_STATUS data-ready poll, and the RESULT range burst. Reports a host-settable distance (default 500 mm); the ranging algorithm is not simulated.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to the VL53L1X fixed address 0x29.

peripherals.label: Sensirion SCD41 CO₂
peripherals.summary: Photoacoustic CO₂ + temperature + humidity sensor over I2C.
peripherals.detail: Sensirion SCD41 at fixed address 0x62, speaking the real Sensirion command protocol (16-bit commands, 16-bit words + CRC-8 poly 0x31), so the unmodified Sensirion SCD4x vendor driver decodes it on-target. CO₂ advances along a configurable ramp each read_measurement, so a closed room climbs from fresh toward stuffy and the firmware verdict flips.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to the SCD41 fixed address 0x62.

config_keys.name: co2_start_ppm
config_keys.doc: CO₂ the ramp starts from, ppm (fresh-room baseline). Default 450.

config_keys.name: co2_target_ppm
config_keys.doc: CO₂ the ramp approaches, ppm (closed-room steady state). Default 1400.

config_keys.name: ramp_alpha
config_keys.doc: Per-measurement approach rate 0..1 (0 = flat scene). Default 0.08.

config_keys.name: temp_c
config_keys.doc: Starting temperature, °C. Default 22.0.

config_keys.name: rh_pct
config_keys.doc: Starting relative humidity, %. Default 45.0.

config_keys.name: rh_target_pct
config_keys.doc: Steady-state relative humidity the room climbs toward, %. Default rh_pct + 6. Raise above 60 for a damp, mold-favorable room.

peripherals.label: Sensirion SGP41 VOC/NOx
peripherals.summary: MOx gas sensor returning raw VOC/NOx signals over I2C.
peripherals.detail: Sensirion SGP41 at fixed address 0x59, speaking the real Sensirion command protocol with CRC-8 (poly 0x31). Returns raw SRAW_VOC / SRAW_NOX ticks that the on-host Sensirion Gas Index Algorithm converts to a VOC Index; the raw VOC signal advances along a configurable ramp.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to the SGP41 fixed address 0x59.

config_keys.name: voc_sraw_start
config_keys.doc: Raw VOC tick at the first measurement (~20000..40000). Default 28000.

config_keys.name: voc_sraw_target
config_keys.doc: Raw VOC tick the ramp approaches. Default 34000.

config_keys.name: nox_sraw
config_keys.doc: Steady raw NOx tick value. Default 16000.

config_keys.name: ramp_alpha
config_keys.doc: Per-measurement approach rate 0..1 (0 = flat scene). Default 0.08.

peripherals.label: Sensirion SPS30 PM
peripherals.summary: Laser particulate-matter sensor (PM1/2.5/4/10) over I2C.
peripherals.detail: Sensirion SPS30 at fixed address 0x69, speaking the real Sensirion command protocol with CRC-8 (poly 0x31) in both float and uint16 output modes. PM2.5 mass advances along a configurable ramp and the other size bins track it. Drive it in uint16 mode on the ESP32-C3 (30-byte frame fits the controller's 32-byte FIFO).

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to the SPS30 fixed address 0x69.

config_keys.name: pm2_5_start
config_keys.doc: PM2.5 mass at the first reading, µg/m³ (clean air). Default 6.0.

config_keys.name: pm2_5_target
config_keys.doc: PM2.5 mass the ramp approaches, µg/m³. Default 22.0.

config_keys.name: ramp_alpha
config_keys.doc: Per-read approach rate 0..1 (0 = flat scene). Default 0.08.

peripherals.label: Vishay VEML7700 Light
peripherals.summary: Ambient-light sensor (lux) over I2C.
peripherals.detail: Vishay VEML7700 at fixed address 0x10, a register-pointer device with 16-bit little-endian words. Reports a raw ALS count the firmware scales to lux at the default gain ×1 / 100 ms resolution (0.0576 lux/count). Light follows a configurable ramp (dims toward evening by default).

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to the VEML7700 fixed address 0x10.

config_keys.name: lux_start
config_keys.doc: Ambient light at the first reading, lux (daylit room). Default 450.

config_keys.name: lux_target
config_keys.doc: Lux the ramp approaches (dims when below start). Default 90.

config_keys.name: ramp_alpha
config_keys.doc: Per-read approach rate 0..1 (0 = flat scene). Default 0.08.

peripherals.label: Melexis MLX90614 IR Temp
peripherals.summary: Single-point IR (non-contact) thermometer over SMBus/I2C.
peripherals.detail: Melexis MLX90614 at address 0x5A. Reports an SMBus read-word (LSB, MSB, PEC) for ambient (0x06) and object/surface (0x07) temperature, encoded raw×0.02 K with a correct CRC-8 PEC. The surface temperature follows a ramp (cools toward a cold window by default), letting firmware compute the dew point and flag surface condensation the air humidity misses.

config_keys.name: i2c_address
config_keys.doc: 7-bit slave address. Defaults to the MLX90614 fixed address 0x5A.

config_keys.name: surface_temp_c
config_keys.doc: Surface (object) temperature at the first reading, °C. Default 18.

config_keys.name: surface_temp_target_c
config_keys.doc: Surface temperature the ramp approaches, °C (cools below start). Default 10.

config_keys.name: ambient_temp_c
config_keys.doc: Ambient (chip) temperature reported on the Ta channel, °C. Default 22.

config_keys.name: ramp_alpha
config_keys.doc: Per-read approach rate 0..1 (0 = flat scene). Default 0.08.
